introSection: Bush Beast was a wooden roller coaster previously located at Wonderland Sydney in Eastern Creek, New South Wales, Australia. The ride was modeled off Wildcat at Coney Island in Cincinnati, Ohio, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
It opened on 7 December 1985.

The coaster closed with the park on 26 April 2004, and remained standing but not operating up until August 2005, after which it was torn down.

fullText:
Bush Beast was a wooden roller coaster previously located at Wonderland Sydney in Eastern Creek, New South Wales, Australia. The ride was modeled off Wildcat at Coney Island in Cincinnati, Ohio, USA.

It opened on 7 December 1985.

The coaster closed with the park on 26 April 2004, and remained standing but not operating up until August 2005, after which it was torn down.
